description: Package the Jido Browser pinned agent-browser binary as a Nix derivation using a Nix glibc interpreter/RPATH rather than the generic /lib64 loader. Wire a stable binary path for development and releases. Acceptance: agent-browser help and a real navigation smoke test pass inside the Nix shell; no manual patching of _build and no global nix-ld requirement.
title: Package agent-browser reproducibly for Nix
